ops.text: E1 gate bake-off COMPLETE (lab log fdbf288c, 12 entries, frozen eval cc007756a4c54ff8). WINNER: lexical TF-IDF(word 1-2g + char 3-5g)+balanced-LR — PR-AUC 0.9361 @ 8.2ms/ex, only cell spending the whole 2/100 alert budget on true positives (recall 0.0246 = ceiling). Encoders (ModernBERT-base 0.8674, Ettin-150m 0.8699 @ 42-46ms) better calibrated (ECE 0.073 vs 0.281) but 0 recall@budget — BUT they were budget-limited (1 epoch, 5.5k rows, 1024 tail tokens; MPS gotcha: pad_to_multiple_of=128 needed or MPSGraph re-specializes shaders per step). Fewshot LLM (sonnet 0.846, haiku 0.820, seconds/call) disqualified for always-on. E6: PR-AUC monotone in rewind W (0.917/0.927/0.936 @ W=1/3/6) — keep full window. E3: mixed negatives best (both 0.936 > hard 0.929 > random 0.918). CAVEATS: lexical keys partly on format artifacts (ANSI remnants, compact markers) — drift-brittle, revisit encoder with bigger budget at next retrain; all families weak on transcript_message positives (0.60-0.75 subgroup PR-AUC); all metrics at view ~4:1 ratio not natural rate. NEXT: Phase 5 retrain loop trains this recipe on full train as gate v001; E2 (3-stage vs 2-stage vs classifier+generator w/ MLX watcher LoRA) + E7 (exemplar ablation) still to run.
